# 🚀 Pull Request

## 📝 Description

<!-- Provide a brief description of the changes and the motivation behind them -->


## 🔄 Type of Change

<!-- Mark the relevant option with an 'x' -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Refactoring (no functional changes, no api changes)
- [ ] 🎨 Style changes (formatting, missing semi colons, etc; no code change)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvements
- [ ] 🧪 Adding or updating tests
- [ ] 🔒 Security improvements

## 🧪 Testing

<!-- Describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes -->

### ✅ Test Results
- [ ] All existing tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Test coverage maintained/improved (`npm run test:coverage`)
- [ ] Manual testing completed

### 🔍 Test Coverage
<!-- If applicable, include coverage statistics -->
- Lines: __%
- Functions: __%
- Branches: __%
- Statements: __%

### 📋 Manual Testing Checklist
- [ ] Tested in online mode (live FHIR API)
- [ ] Tested in offline mode (sample data)
- [ ] Tested search functionality
- [ ] Tested concept selection and details
- [ ] Tested error scenarios
- [ ] Tested keyboard navigation
- [ ] Tested accessibility (screen reader)

## 🛠️ Code Quality

### ✅ Quality Checklist
- [ ] Code follows DRY principles
- [ ] Single Responsibility Principle maintained
- [ ] TypeScript strict mode compliance
- [ ] ESLint warnings resolved (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Code formatted with Prettier (`npm run format`)
- [ ] No debug logging left in code
- [ ] Error handling implemented appropriately

### 📊 Performance Impact
- [ ] No performance regressions
- [ ] Debouncing optimizations maintained
- [ ] Memory leaks prevented
- [ ] Component re-renders optimized

## ♿ Accessibility

- [ ] WCAG 2.1 AA compliance maintained
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works correctly
- [ ] Screen reader compatibility verified
- [ ] Color contrast requirements met
- [ ] ARIA attributes properly used

## 📚 Documentation

- [ ] Code is self-documenting with clear variable/function names
- [ ] Complex logic includes comments
- [ ] README updated (if applicable)
- [ ] API documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Component documentation updated (if applicable)

## 🔗 Related Issues

<!-- Link to related issues using keywords -->
Closes #
Fixes #
Resolves #

## 📸 Screenshots

<!-- If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your changes -->

## 🚀 Deployment Notes

<!-- Any special deployment considerations -->

- [ ] No database changes required
- [ ] No environment variable changes required
- [ ] No breaking API changes
- [ ] Backward compatible

## 📝 Additional Notes

<!-- Any additional information that reviewers should know -->

### 🔍 Reviewer Checklist

<!-- For reviewers -->

- [ ] Code review completed
- [ ] Tests are comprehensive and pass
- [ ] Documentation is adequate
- [ ] No security vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] Performance impact acceptable
- [ ] Accessibility requirements met
- [ ] Ready for merge
